# PuTab

## Intent

- tab item
- tab option

## Prefer When

- Use inside PuTabs when individual tab components are required.

## Avoid When

- Avoid standalone usage.

## Import

```ts
import { PuTab } from '@partner-up-dev/design-web'
```

## Props

- `label`
- `active`
- `disabled`
- `showDot`
- `variant`
- `state`
- `size`

## Slots

- `default`

## Events

- No emitted events extracted.

## Composition

- PuTabs

## Story Variants

Story: `src/stories/display/PuTabs.story.vue`

- Controlled Value Tabs
- Sizes
- Pill Tab Bar
- Scrollable Active Tab
- Disabled And Keyboard
- Standalone Tab Variants

## Types

- `PuTabProps`
- `PuTabVariant`

## Caveats

- Use the shared PuSize vocabulary for sizing.
- Use variant line or pill to match the parent PuTabs presentation.
- Use state dashed for pill tabs that represent expired or visually reduced options.
